title: Bert's July Dividend Income Summary | Dividend Investing 2022
text: Our total dividend income decreased from $771.96 received in July 2021. Canadian Imperial takes the crown for the largest dividend payment of the month.

title: Buy 4 S&P 500 August Dog Days Dividend Aristocrats
text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years." - Kiplinger.com/Investing. 65 Aristocrats screened as of August 4, 2022 represented all eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker estimated top-ten net gains ranged 14.54%-40.69% topped by XOM & SWK.

title: These Were The Five Best And Worst Performing Large-Cap Stocks In July 2022
text: Large-cap stocks are a must for investors looking for some stability in their portfolio.

title: Cincinnati Financial: A Post-Drop Dividend King
text: I've not written about Cincinnati Financial Corporation before - but it's time to do so following a significant drop in the company's share price. This drop increased the company's appeal as an investment, and it could be possible to invest in the company at this price.
